current.name: INDAY
current.pressure: Not specified in latest PAGASA bulletin (930 hPa at 5 AM)
current.outlook: Maintains super-typhoon strength until Thu 09 Jul; forecast to weaken to a typhoon by Thu evening or early Fri morning. Nearest Extreme N. Luzon by Fri 10 Jul; heads toward the sea north of Taiwan; exits PAR Sat 11 Jul; forecast China landfall Sun 12 Jul. Likely stays over the Philippine Sea.

marine.advice: Sea travel is risky for all types/tonnage of vessels in the affected seaboards. Mariners must remain in port or seek safe harbor until winds and waves subside.

satellite.note: Satellite imagery is visual context only. Cloud position/appearance must not be used to infer storm movement — the official center and track come from PAGASA.
